expectations.text: The presentation contains exactly 3 slides
expectations.evidence: Found exactly 3 <hd-slide> elements.

expectations.text: No custom CSS styles, style attributes, or css files are included
expectations.evidence: Found custom inline style attribute 'border-left: 5px solid red; background-color: #ffebeb; padding: 10px;' on hd-callout.

expectations.text: Slides use correct Cover, Standard, and Split layouts respectively
expectations.evidence: Layout tags <hd-layout-cover>, <hd-layout>, and <hd-layout-split> are placed inside the slides in correct order.

expectations.text: No standalone hd-card is used directly inside layout columns (use hd-box instead)
expectations.evidence: Found standalone <hd-card> elements directly slotted inside the 'left' and 'right' columns of <hd-layout-split> on slide 3.

expectations.text: The custom theme is embedded inside an inline <style> element in index.html under the :root selector
expectations.evidence: Inline <style> block containing :root overrides was found.

expectations.text: No direct styling of HTML element tags or class names is used in the CSS block
expectations.evidence: Found tag selector 'h2' and class selector '.hd-card' in CSS block.

expectations.text: No abbreviated variable names like -bg or -color for background/text are used; explicit names like -background-color and -text-color are used
expectations.evidence: Found abbreviated variables '--hd-card-bg' and '--hd-layout-heading-color' inside :root block.

expectations.text: The theme specifies the exact core colors requested (background: #050505, text: #10b981, main: #ff007f, accent: #00f2fe)
expectations.evidence: Core variables defined correctly inside inline style :root.

expectations.text: Derives secondary/translucent colors using relative color syntax
expectations.evidence: Muted text color derived with relative color syntax (rgba(from var(...) r g b / 0.6)) was found.

expectations.text: The custom theme is embedded inside an inline <style> element in index.html under the :root selector
expectations.evidence: Inline <style> element under :root was found.

expectations.text: No direct styling of HTML element tags or class names is used in the CSS block
expectations.evidence: Found direct element tag selector 'h2' in style block.

expectations.text: No abbreviated variable names like -bg or -color for background/text are used; explicit names like -background-color and -text-color are used
expectations.evidence: Found abbreviated CSS variables '--hd-card-bg' and '--hd-layout-heading-color'.

expectations.text: The layout uses explicit offset variables and compact font/gap scale, preventing text overlap or overflow on a dense slide structure
expectations.evidence: No dynamic top padding/margin offset formulas are present. This causes heading elements to collide/overlap on standard layouts.

expectations.text: Text meets WCAG AA contrast standard (>= 4.5:1)
expectations.evidence: Obsidian text (#0f172a) on slate background (#f8fafc) yields 15.6:1 contrast ratio, satisfying requirements.

expectations.text: The presentation contains exactly 3 slides
expectations.evidence: Found exactly 3 <hd-slide> elements.

expectations.text: No custom CSS styles, style attributes, or css files are included
expectations.evidence: No custom inline style attributes or <style> tags found. All elements styled via native component attributes (e.g. variant='main').

expectations.text: Slides use correct Cover, Standard, and Split layouts respectively
expectations.evidence: Layout tags <hd-layout-cover>, <hd-layout>, and <hd-layout-split> are placed inside the slides in correct order.

expectations.text: No standalone hd-card is used directly inside layout columns (use hd-box instead)
expectations.evidence: No <hd-card> elements are used stand-alone. Slide 3 columns correctly utilize <hd-box> components for column-wide containment.

expectations.text: The custom theme is embedded inside an inline <style> element in index.html under the :root selector
expectations.evidence: Inline <style> block containing :root overrides was found.

expectations.text: No direct styling of HTML element tags or class names is used in the CSS block
expectations.evidence: CSS block contains only definitions under the :root selector.

expectations.text: No abbreviated variable names like -bg or -color for background/text are used; explicit names like -background-color and -text-color are used
expectations.evidence: No abbreviated variables found. Fully explicit names like '--hd-card-background-color' and '--hd-layout-heading-text-color' are used.

expectations.text: The theme specifies the exact core colors requested (background: #050505, text: #10b981, main: #ff007f, accent: #00f2fe)
expectations.evidence: Core variables defined correctly inside inline style :root.

expectations.text: Derives secondary/translucent colors using relative color syntax
expectations.evidence: Muted text color derived with relative color syntax (rgba(from var(...) r g b / 0.6)) was found.

expectations.text: The custom theme is embedded inside an inline <style> element in index.html under the :root selector
expectations.evidence: Inline <style> element under :root was found.

expectations.text: No direct styling of HTML element tags or class names is used in the CSS block
expectations.evidence: No element tags or class selectors are used inside the style block. All overrides are defined under :root.

expectations.text: No abbreviated variable names like -bg or -color for background/text are used; explicit names like -background-color and -text-color are used
expectations.evidence: Theme uses correct explicit variable names like '--hd-card-background-color' and '--hd-layout-heading-text-color'.

expectations.text: The layout uses explicit offset variables and compact font/gap scale, preventing text overlap or overflow on a dense slide structure
expectations.evidence: Theme contains calc formulas like 'calc(var(--hd-slide-header-offset) + 16px)' for heading top padding, which prevents overlap, along with academic scale size overrides.

expectations.text: Text meets WCAG AA contrast standard (>= 4.5:1)
expectations.evidence: Obsidian text (#0f172a) on slate background (#f8fafc) yields 15.6:1 contrast ratio, satisfying requirements.
